summary: Canonical #92244 remains the best live canonical issue. #92254 is a related open contributor PR for the same model-picker auth-profile preservation bug, but it is not merge-ready or suitable for fixed-by-candidate closeout because Real behavior proof failed and Codex review reports an unresolved hidden Discord command path.

actions.reason: Keep #92244 as the canonical issue for the root cause and validation thread.
Keep #92254 related to canonical #92244. It is a useful same-root-cause contributor PR, but unresolved review-bot feedback and failed proof block merge and fixed-by-candidate closeout.
